name: segment-console
description: Credit card customer segmentation — FastAPI + Next.js

scripts.setup: npm run setup:api && npm run setup:web
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:api: cross-env API_RELOAD=true API_HOST=127.0.0.1 API_PORT=8001 API_WORKERS=1 powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/dev-api.ps1
scripts.start: concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run start:api" "npm run start:web"
scripts.start:api: cross-env API_RELOAD=false API_HOST=0.0.0.0 API_PORT=8001 API_WORKERS=2 npm run _serve:api
